title: Add top-level robot triage mega-command
recommendation: Support `vacuum --robot-triage` so agents can discover health, capabilities, contracts, and recommendations in one call.

title: Add top-level capabilities JSON surface
recommendation: Support `vacuum capabilities --json` in addition to the doctor-scoped command.

title: Add agent guide command
recommendation: Support `vacuum robot-docs guide` with paste-ready agent commands and stream contracts.

title: Accept explicit JSON intent for scans
recommendation: Accept `--json` as a scan no-op because scan stdout is already JSONL.

title: Make root refusals teach the next command
recommendation: Populate `refusal.next_command` for empty roots, missing roots, permission errors, and filesystem errors when safe.

title: Make unavailable fix mode name safe alternatives
recommendation: Recognize `vacuum doctor --fix`, keep it unavailable, and print safe read-only alternatives to stderr.
